parameters.content:
## Workflow 2 - Payment Failure / Cancellation
Grace periods by plan: Weekly 1d, Fortnightly 2d, Monthly 3d, Quarterly 5d.

- **invoice.payment_failed**: mock pause 3CX -> SMS -> daily reminder loop until grace ends -> mock delete 3CX -> release DID (2-step) -> cancel Stripe sub.
- **customer.subscription.deleted**: mock pause -> SMS (5-day reactivation) -> wait 5 days -> mock delete 3CX -> release DID (2-step).
- **invoice.payment_succeeded** (only if it was a retry after failure): mock re-enable 3CX -> SMS active again.

Customer SMS uses the ClickSend dedicated number (two-way). orderId/numberId/mobile resolve from the subscriber store at live integration.
